nasb.text: You were the anointed cherub who covers, And I placed you there. You were on the holy mountain of God; You walked in the midst of the stones of fire.

esv.text: You were an anointed guardian cherub. I placed you; you were on the holy mountain of God; in the midst of the stones of fire you walked.

cnv.text: 你是護衛寶座的、受膏的基路伯； 我安置你在　神的聖山上， 你在閃耀如火的寶石中間行走。

ccb.text: 我膏立你为看守约柜的基路伯天使。 你在上帝的圣山上， 在闪闪发光的宝石中行走。
